01

About

I graduated with a B.Tech in Computer Science from Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya, Bhopal, after a diploma in the same field. Most of what I know I picked up by building — small tools, UI experiments, and projects that solve a problem I actually had.

Right now I'm dedicated to mastering JavaScript, diving deep into Python Programming, and expanding my framework knowledge with Tailwind CSS while looking for a place to put that into real work as a software developer. My journey in tech began with a deep curiosity about how things work under the hood, which led me to earn my Diploma and B.Tech in Computer Science.

HTML CSS JavaScript Tailwind Python
